llm_judge.description:
Provide a prompt for the LLM judge to evaluate and make assertions about:
- the state of the database after the assistant completes the prompt. The judge may use any available read-only MCP tools to check and validate these assertions.
- if prompt references $response, the assistant’s response for this eval case will be made available for evaluation.
- if prompt references $conversation, the full conversation history, including tool calls and tool results for this eval case, will be accessible for evaluation.
- if prompt references $reference_answer, the reference answer as specified in the "expected.reference_answer" field will be made available for evaluation.

reference_answer.description:
The reference answer for the eval case. This provides human reviewers with a clear example of the expected answer.
                If the LLM judge prompt references $reference_answer, this value will be made available to the judge for automated evaluation.

description: Expected outcome for a case, expressed as LLM-judge criteria.
